# Xenith — AI Growth Engine for X

> Xenith helps creators and teams grow on X (Twitter) with AI-powered content
> drafting, suggested replies, engagement insights, post scheduling, and a
> 0–100 draft score based on X algorithm signals. The Creator plan is $24/month.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://growwithxenith.com): Product overview — content drafting, reply assistant, trend detection, analytics, and scheduling for X.
- [Follower Milestone Maker](https://growwithxenith.com/milestone): Free browser-based tool to make an animated video or image celebrating an X follower milestone. No account required.

## What Xenith does

- Turns creator feeds into a posting playbook, generating drafts influenced by writing patterns while preserving the user's own voice.
- Scores every draft from 0–100 using X algorithm signals to estimate likely likes, reposts, and replies.
- Suggests replies to high-traction posts so users can engage early without living in the X feed.
- Schedules posts and publishes to X without copy-paste.

## Plans

- Creator: $24/month (or $20/month billed yearly). Includes 10 post drafts/day, 1,000 reply credits, unlimited scheduling, tracking across 10 X profiles, and X algorithm-based analytics.

## Contact

- Email: hello@growwithxenith.com
- X: https://x.com/growwithxenith
